tspan.tspan: I'm a passionate frontend developer with a strong focus on building custom
web applications mostly using Vue with some knowledge about Web
With years of experience across various industries, I've contributed to UI
libraries, optimized performance, and collaborated closely with cross
functional teams to deliver seamless user experiences. My expertise includes
modern frontend frameworks, component-driven development, and testing
methodologies using tools like Storybook and Vitest.
